duplicate_charge.policy: If the same invoice or billing period was charged twice due to a system error, support may apply a credit for the duplicate amount.

proration.policy: Mid-cycle upgrades create prorated line items. If the calculation matches the plan change timing, explain the charge instead of applying a credit.

late_fee_waiver.policy: A one-time courtesy late-fee waiver may be granted when the account has no recent waiver history and the account is otherwise healthy.

service_credit.policy: Approved outage or SLA incidents may qualify for a service credit when the account is on the impacted plan or workspace tier.

invoice_metadata.policy: Changes to PO numbers, remit-to details, or invoice metadata require human billing operations review.

contract_mismatch.policy: If an invoice appears inconsistent with signed commercial terms, escalate to a human specialist for contract review.
